# @architecture/validate-lifecycle-evidence

Validates and generates lifecycle transition evidence bundles.

## Package identity

```text
Name: @architecture/validate-lifecycle-evidence
Version: 0.1.0
Component: validate-lifecycle-evidence
Type: tool
System: architecture-governance

Owner: architecture
```

```text
Stage: active
Role: tooling
Class: active.tooling
Catalog lifecycle: production
Visibility: internal
Support level: standard
Review cadence: quarterly
```

## Ownership

```text
Owner: architecture
Change control: owner-review
Promotion eligible: true
Semver policy: internal-traceable
```

## Responsibilities

- Validate lifecycle evidence bundles against governed schema
- Generate lifecycle evidence bundle skeletons from package metadata
- Emit self-evidence for validation and generation runs

## Non-responsibilities

- Does not approve lifecycle transitions
- Does not modify package metadata
- Does not replace human review

## Public exports and usage

```text
Public exports only: true
Deep imports allowed: false
```

- Run from repository root with node tools/architecture/validate-lifecycle-evidence/src/index.mjs --check
- Use --write with --package, --from-class, --to-class, and --reason to generate a bundle
